title: QP Eligibility: The Three Pillars
alt: Three pillars of QP eligibility before the viva: degree, experience and study record

items.label: Appropriate Degree
items.desc: Pharmacy, chemistry, biology or related, covering prescribed subjects

items.label: Practical Experience
items.desc: Hands-on quality work in a licensed manufacturing environment

items.label: Study & Experience Record
items.desc: Compiled to the study guide and signed off by a QP sponsor
